title: SACRAMENTO, CA – Senator Ben Allen (D-Santa Monica) celebrated Resilient Palisades in Sacramento as the 24 th Senate District’s Nonprofit of the Year!

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Resilient Palisades promotes best climate and environmental practices that can be implemented across entire communities.",
    "The organization provides resources to transition toward sustainable practices and cleaner alternatives, including electric garden equipment and renewable energy sources.",
    "Resilient Palisades aids in recovery and relief efforts after the Palisades Fire, providing guiding principles for reimagining and rebuilding a climate-resilient neighborhood.",
    "The organization is advancing a vision for rebuilding the region using fire-resilient designs and materials.",
    "Resilient Palisades is implementing water reuse and security measures as part of their rebuilding efforts.",
    "The organization is developing renewable energy systems and microgrid projects to create a clean, reliable utility infrastructure.",
    "The rebuilding plan emphasizes that sustainability is the foundation of insurability.",
    "The plan includes fire-resilient construction and design, native landscaping, and full electrification of all new homes and businesses."
  ]
}
```
